items.author: Su-hua WangDepartment of Psychology, University of California, Santa Cruz
items.content: <article>Current Directions in Psychological Science, Ahead of Print. How do children learn in everyday situations? items.title: The Integration of Explanation and Prediction in Behavioral Science
items.author: Abdullah Almaatouq, Robin Na
items.content: <article>Current Directions in Psychological Science, Ahead of Print. Behavioral scientists aim to explain and predict behavior. In principle, these goals align; in practice, common approaches to pursuing them have become distinct traditions in tension with one another. items.title: Intellectual Humility in the Eyes of Others: Implications for Social Perception and Trust
items.author: Jonah Koetke, Karina Schumann
items.content: <article>Current Directions in Psychological Science, Ahead of Print.
